title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at GAIL India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at GAIL India
jsonLd.description:
GAIL India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About GAIL India:
GAIL India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAIL India!
